entity.summary: Avalanche automated-market-maker decentralized exchange providing wallet-based token swaps, liquidity pools, yield farming, trade mining, staking pools, and related DeFi features.
entity.notes: Current official application remains reachable. First-party documentation identifies HakuSwap as an Avalanche AMM DEX and distinguishes the protocol, interface, and governance surfaces while documenting swaps, liquidity pools, yield farming, trade mining, and staking features.

evidence.title: Meet HakuSwap
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies HakuSwap as an Avalanche DEX AMM and describes the protocol, interface, trading, liquidity, farming, trade mining, staking, and governance surfaces.

evidence.title: HakuSwap Exchange documentation
evidence.notes: First-party exchange documentation describes wallet-routed token swaps, AMM liquidity pools, LP tokens, and trading-fee rewards.

evidence.title: HakuSwap official application
evidence.notes: Current first-party Avalanche application endpoint remains reachable as the HakuSwap interface.
